page: lessons/03-the-one-rule/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

message.content:
1 John 3:21 | And if our heart condemn us not, then have we confidence toward God;
2 Psalm 86:5 | For thou art good, and willing to forgive; and plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon thee.
3 Colossians 3:13 | Forbearing as in the Lord, one to another, forgiving each other if any have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also do ye.
4 Ephesians 4:32 | And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ's sake hath forgiven you.
5 Hebrews 10:17 | Which is an adding of that which cometh before the saying: It shall be forgiven them; and his sins I will remember no more.

finalAnswer:

2 Psalm 86:5 | For thou art good, and willing to forgive; and plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon thee.
3 Colossians 3:13 | Forbearing as in the Lord, one to another, forgiving each other if any have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also do ye.
4 Ephesians 4:32 | And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ's sake hath forgiven you.
5 Hebrews 10:17 | Which is an adding of that which cometh before the saying: It shall be forgiven them; and his sins I will remember no more.
